rationale: The sole substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26's ask about verifying device_communicator/reduce_scatter coverage in the new test) is directly echoed by X's finding that TP lacks the same hasattr assertions PCP/DP/EP got — a closely-related, concrete, grounded catch with a specific fix. Y's review is thorough and well-reasoned but affirms correctness everywhere ('PASS') and its single nit (a documentation suggestion about dp_metadata caching) never touches the test-coverage gap the human reviewer actually flagged. X's three findings are all grounded in the diff with precise file:line locations and concrete asks, making it both more actionable and more aligned with real reviewer concerns than Y's single soft suggestion.
